system_response: Keep same skill and theme, vary example type.
Increase difficulty by one step and reduce hints.
guardrail: Stay within age-band safety and confidence limits.

system_response: Drop difficulty and switch to more visual guidance.

trigger: Child asks for math, reading, science, or logic challenge
system_response: Map request to subject and current mastery window.
guardrail: Do not jump too far ahead without readiness evidence.

trigger: Child returns after multiple missed days
system_response: Offer a short confidence-building re-entry session.
